locations.name: 印度洋
locations.summary: 印度洋（英語：Indian Ocean），位于亚洲、非洲、大洋洲和南极洲之间，印度位在印度洋北部的中央位置，這也是印度洋名稱的由來，印度洋大部分在南半球。總面积7491万平方公里，约占世界海洋总面积的21.1%，是世界第三大洋。印度洋的範…

relations.subject: Comoro thrush
relations.evidence: The Comoro thrush is classified as Near threatened by the IUCN and the main threat is habitat loss through forest degradation due to clearance by subsistence farmers and firewood cutting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
